title: sideroxylon inerme subsp. inerme
intro: Sideroxylon inerme subsp. inerme, also known as the smooth-fruited mastic tree, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of using Sideroxylon inerme subsp. inerme include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and swelling, and treat various infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves, bark, and roots in hot water or a solvent.
